candidate_definition_hints.text: PyTorch re-implementation of DeepLab v2 on COCO-Stuff / PASCAL VOC datasets
This is an unofficial **PyTorch** implementation of **DeepLab v2** [[1](##references)] with a **ResNet-101** backbone.
